The new kernel keeps the fixed `128x128` 4-wave MFMA tiling, extends the launch grid by `SPLIT_K_SLICES = 2`, accumulates per-split fp32 partials into a shared fp32 workspace with `S.amdgpu.buffer_atomic_add_f32`, and finalizes into bf16 NCHW output with a second kernel.
